mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, write_date, hr_id, reg_nm, reg_dt, reg_detail, reg_check_yn, cancle_dt, cancle_detail, cancle_check_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{writeDate}, #{hrId}, #{regNm}, #{regDt}, #{regDetail}, #{regCheckYn}, #{cancleDt}, #{cancleDetail}, #{cancleCheckYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg SET write_date=#{writeDate}, use_yn=#{useYn}, hr_id=#{hrId}, reg_nm=#{regNm}, reg_dt=#{regDt}, reg_detail=#{regDetail}, reg_check_yn=#{regCheckYn}, cancle_dt=#{cancleDt}, cancle_detail=#{cancleDetail}, cancle_check_yn=#{cancleCheckYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type= #{docType}
mapper.delete: UPDATE esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg SET use_yn='N', updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type= #{docType}
mapper.select: SELECT tqcr.*, sf.file_id as logoId, thi.hr_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm, toi.orgn_nm as orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg tqcr left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on thi.hr_id = tqcr.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = thi.hr_id AND sf.target_type = 'hrImg' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = thi.orgn_id WHERE tqcr.comp_id = #{compId}

SELECT tqcr.*, thi.hr_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm, toi.orgn_nm as orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg tqcr left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on thi.hr_id = tqcr.hr_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = thi.orgn_id WHERE doc_type=#{docType} and write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no=#{docNo}

SELECT tqcr.*, thi.hr_nm, jbrp.jbrp_nm, toi.orgn_nm as orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_qualification_cert_reg tqcr left join esg.tb_hr_info thi on thi.hr_id = tqcr.hr_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = thi.jbrp and jbrp.comp_id = #{compId} left join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.orgn_id = thi.orgn_id WHERE doc_type=#{docType} and write_year=#{writeYear} and doc_no IN
#{docNo}
